relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The seventh seal opens into heaven's silence.
Seven trumpets are given to seven messengers.
Incense joins the prayers of holy ones before the throne.
Altar-fire touches earth with thunder and shaking.
The first trumpet exposes wounded earth.
Sea-life and ships share the sign of disruption.
The eagle cries warning over what remains.

contemplative_note: Revelation 8 turns silence into prayer and prayer into trumpet-warning: creation groans as the altar answers.
